mapper.sql: select sop_id, material_id, model_id, line_id, stage_id, process_id,terminal_id, sop_page,type, status from mes_upload_terminal_page
mapper.select: select a.sop_id, a.line_id, a.stage_id, a.process_id, a.sop_page,a.terminal_id,a.type from mes_upload_terminal_page a where a.oa_id = #{oaId}
mapper.insert:
insert into mes_upload_terminal_page
oa_id, sop_id, type, material_id, model_id, line_id, stage_id, process_id, terminal_id, sop_page, sop_interval, version_status, status, project, create_by, create_time,
#{oaId}, #{sopId}, #{type}, #{materialId}, #{modelId}, #{lineId}, #{stageId}, #{processId}, #{terminalId}, #{sopPage}, #{sopInterval}, #{versionStatus}, #{status}, #{project}, #{createBy}, #{createTime},
mapper.update:
update mes_upload_terminal_page
sop_id = #{sopId},
line_id = #{lineId}, stage_id = #{stageId}, process_id = #{processId}, terminal_id = #{terminalId}, sop_page = #{sopPage}, status = #{status}, version_status = #{versionStatus},
where sop_id = #{sopId}
mapper.delete:
delete from mes_upload_terminal_page where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT A.model_id,c.model_name,A.line_id,d.line_name,A.stage_id,e.stage_name,A.process_id,f.process_name,A.material_id,g.material_name FROM mes_upload_terminal_page A left join mes_model c on a.model_id = c.model_id left join mes_line d on a.line_id = d.line_id left join mes_stage e on a.stage_id = e.stage_id left join mes_process f on a.process_id = f.process_id left join mes_material_info g on a.material_id = g.id WHERE A.sop_id = #{sopId}

SELECT A.sop_id,H.sop_name,A.sop_page,B.model_name,C.material_name,D.line_name,E.stage_name,F.process_name, G.terminal_name,H.version FROM mes_upload_terminal_page A, mes_model B, mes_material_info C, mes_line D, mes_stage E, mes_process F, mes_terminal G, mes_sop H WHERE A.model_id = B.model_id AND A.material_id = C.id AND A.line_id = D.line_id AND A.stage_id = E.stage_id AND A.process_id = F.process_id AND A.terminal_id = G.terminal_id AND A.sop_id = H.sop_id AND A.sop_id = #{sopId}

SELECT A.oa_id, A.sop_id, B.sop_name, A.type, A.material_id, H.material_name, A.model_id, C.model_name, A.line_id, D.line_name, A.stage_id, E.stage_name, A.process_id, F.process_name, A.sop_page, A.terminal_id, G.terminal_name, A.`status`, A.create_time FROM mes_upload_terminal_page A left join mes_sop B on A.SOP_ID = B.sop_id left join mes_model C on A.model_id = C.model_id left join mes_line D on A.line_id = D.line_id left join mes_stage E on A.stage_id = E.stage_id left join mes_process F on A.process_id = F.process_id left join mes_terminal G on A.terminal_id = G.terminal_id left join mes_material_info H on A.material_id = H.id WHERE A.material_id = #{materialId} AND A.create_time = (SELECT MAX( create_time ) FROM mes_upload_terminal_page)

SELECT DISTINCT A.sop_id as sopId, B.sop_name as sopName, A.material_id as materialId, D.material_name as materialName, A.model_id as modelId, C.model_name as modelName, A.line_id as lineId, E.line_name as lineName, A.stage_id as stageId, F.stage_name as stageName, A.process_id as processId, G.process_name as processName,
B.version as version, A.version_status as versionStatus, A.type as type, A.create_time as createTime FROM mes_upload_terminal_page A left join mes_sop B on A.sop_id = B.sop_id left join mes_model C on A.model_id = C.model_id left join mes_material_info D on A.material_id = D.id left join mes_line E on A.line_id = E.line_id left join mes_stage F on A.stage_id = F.stage_id left join mes_process G on A.process_id = G.process_id
and A.model_id = #{modelId} and A.material_id = #{materialId} and A.line_id = #{lineId} and A.stage_id = #{stageId} and A.process_id = #{processId}
and B.sop_name like concat('%', #{lineName}, '%') and E.line_name like concat('%', #{lineName}, '%') and F.stage_name like concat('%', #{stageName}, '%') and G.process_name like concat('%', #{processName}, '%') AND A.`status` = '2'
ORDER BY A.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.line_id as lineId, E.line_name as lineName, A.stage_id as stageId, F.stage_name as stageName, A.process_id as processId, G.process_name as processName FROM mes_upload_terminal_page A left join mes_sop B on A.sop_id = B.sop_id left join mes_model C on A.model_id = C.model_id left join mes_material_info D on A.material_id = D.id left join mes_line E on A.line_id = E.line_id left join mes_stage F on A.stage_id = F.stage_id left join mes_process G on A.process_id = G.process_id
and A.line_id = #{lineId} and A.stage_id = #{stageId} and A.process_id = #{processId} and E.line_name like concat('%', #{lineName}, '%') and F.stage_name like concat('%', #{stageName}, '%') and G.process_name like concat('%', #{processName}, '%')

SELECT DISTINCT A.sop_id, B.sop_name,
A.line_id, E.line_name, A.stage_id, F.stage_name, A.process_id, G.process_name, A.terminal_id, H.mac_name, B.version, A.version_status, A.type, A.create_time FROM mes_upload_terminal_page A left join mes_sop B on A.sop_id = B.sop_id
left join mes_line E on A.line_id = E.line_id left join mes_stage F on A.stage_id = F.stage_id left join mes_process G on A.process_id = G.process_id left join mes_mac H on A.terminal_id = H.mac_id
and A.line_id = #{lineId} and A.stage_id = #{stageId} and A.process_id = #{processId} and A.sop_id = #{sopId} AND A.`status` = '2'
ORDER BY A.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT mutp.sop_id, mutp.version_status, ms.version, ms.sop_name, ms.type FROM mes_upload_terminal_page mutp, mes_sop ms
mutp.sop_id = ms.sop_id AND mutp.version_status = 0 AND mutp.status = 2 and mutp.process_id = #{processId}
